SWARM-REANIMATED.description: Module that animates swarms of tokens.

SWARM-REANIMATED.settings.enabled: Turns this the token into an animated swarm.
SWARM-REANIMATED.settings.above: Places the swarm above player tokens.
SWARM-REANIMATED.settings.count: Maximum number of sprites in the swarm.
SWARM-REANIMATED.settings.movement: Relative movement speed of the swarm (higher numbers means they move faster).
SWARM-REANIMATED.settings.gridSize: Size of the swarm, in grid squares, that the swarm roams inside of. Defaults to the token's own size if left blank.
SWARM-REANIMATED.settings.followToken: If checked, the whole swarm moves instantly together with the token. If unchecked, sprites individually catch up to the token's new location over time.
SWARM-REANIMATED.settings.animation: The pattern used by the swarm as they move across the map.
SWARM-REANIMATED.settings.tokenScale: If checked, swarm sprites will match the token's own size set in the token Appearance Scale slider. If unchecked, sprites use the Swarm Sprite Scale field below instead.
SWARM-REANIMATED.settings.spriteScale: Independent sprite scale for each swarm sprite. This is used only when 'Use Token Scale' setting above is unchecked.
